name: Oxilofrine
description: Oxilofrine is used in combination with [DB11609] as an antitussive. It is currently marketed in Canada by Valeant under the tradename Cophylac.
indication: Used in combination with [DB11609] as an antitussive [FDA Label].
mechanismOfAction: Oxilofrine is likely helps to treat cough by stimulating α1 adrenergic receptors resulting in vasoconstriction. This would serve to reduce secretion of mucus into the airway and lessen the stimulus to cough.
pharmacodynamics: Oxilofrine is a sympathomimetic which increases adrenergic activity [L888].

interactions.name: Acemetacin
interactions.description: The therapeutic efficacy of Acemetacin can be decreased when used in combination with Oxilofrine.
